ddls:
CREATE TABLE "happiness_indicators" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each record */,
  "country_code" TEXT /* Standardized country code */,
  "score" REAL /* Happiness score of the country */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the score was recorded */,
  "gdp_per_capita" REAL /* GDP per capita of the country */,
  "social_support" REAL /* Social support in the country */,
  "life_expectancy" REAL /* Life expectancy at birth */,
  "freedom_to_make_life_choices" REAL /* Freedom to make life choices */,
  "generosity" REAL /* Generosity in the country */,
  "perceptions_of_corruption" REAL /* Perceptions of corruption */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Total population of the country */,
  "unemployment_rate" REAL /* Unemployment rate in the country */,
  "inflation_rate" REAL /* Inflation rate in the country */,
  "data_source_id" INTEGER /* Source of the happiness score data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_code" TEXT /* Standardized country code */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "continent" TEXT /* Continent where the country is located */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region where the country is located */,
  "capital" TEXT /* Capital city of the country */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for login */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for security */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Role of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "data_source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "source_description" TEXT /* Description of the data source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_source_id")
)
column_names: GDP per capita of the country
Source of the happiness score data
Continent where the country is located
Region where the country is located
Unique identifier for each data source
